privileged_info_summary: The Ekylibre environment uses real farm data from GAEC JOULIN, a documented French agricultural cooperative from Charente-Maritime (SIRET 32627372900011, now dissolved). The task operates on the 2023 campaign of this real farm data, containing soft winter wheat (Blé tendre d'hiver, activity_id=3) parcels. The task requires creating at least 3 spraying interventions dated 2023-06-15 for wheat parcels affected by a Fusarium head blight alert. The admin credentials for http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 are admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678. The TELEPAC 2023 dataset includes Blé tendre parcels in multiple fields (ilots 1, 2, 6, 7, 10, 12, 17), with historical spray records covering 6 specific zones (ZC#01, ZC#02, ZC#06, ZC#07, ZC#10, ZC#19).
